xs.$description: Extra small container width for narrow mobile layouts

sm.$description: Small container width for compact mobile layouts

md.$description: Medium container width for compact content areas and small modals

lg.$description: Large container width for standard content columns

xl.$description: Extra large container width for wider content sections

2xl.$description: Container width for form layouts and medium dialogs

3xl.$description: Container width matching tablet portrait breakpoint

4xl.$description: Container width for wide content areas and large modals

5xl.$description: Container width matching tablet landscape breakpoint

7xl.$description: Container width for wide desktop layouts

8xl.$description: Maximum container width for full-width desktop layouts
